text:
Does the patient need or want an interpreter CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident needs or wants an interpreter to communicate with a doctor or health care staff. 0=No
1=Yes
9=Unable to determine effective 10/01/2023
845 TRNSPRTN_MDCL_CD TRNSPRTN_MDCL_CD A1250A Transportation: Yes, medical CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident's lack of transportation has kept them from medical appointments or from getting their medications. 0=No
1=Yes effective
